title: C418 Discs
description: Adds C418's minecraft soundtrack as Discs.
body:
**A mod which adds C418's original Minecraft Soundtrack as Music Discs.**

![Now Playing: C418 - Subwoofer Lullaby](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2acd10a8fe4e79ca594fa49a2b82fc323279052f.png)

Uses Fabric 1.21, and it **requires the Fabric API for 1.21**

Planned Features:

- C148's 'Beta' Theme Album
- Other Video Game OST's

Enjoy :)

Any feedback? adarshthoduvakkal@gmail.com
